creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Florian Walpen from comment #1)

Thank you, Florian, for your answer.

I use rc script to start Jack.
And Ardour6 runs under my regular user.

idprio(1) shows that the daemon runs at realtime priority 0.
Same problem occurs when the Ardour process is set 0 priority.


Yuri
